title: Humanoid Daily Task Demonstrations
description: Collect and annotate full-body demonstrations of daily household tasks for training NEO-class humanoid robots. Contributors perform and narrate everyday activities — tidying, cooking, laundry, cleaning — producing the multi-modal data (video + language + task plan) needed for generalist home robot policies.

tasks.title: Record daily task demonstration
tasks.description: Record yourself performing a household task (5–15 minutes). Include narration: describe what you're doing and why. Multiple camera angles encouraged.

tasks.title: Full Embodiment-X processing
tasks.description: Person detection, pose estimation (full body + hands), temporal segmentation, motion scoring, object tracking.

tasks.title: Full Embodiment-X annotation
tasks.description: Cull uninformative segments, fine-cut action boundaries, assign action labels, edit bounding boxes, write language instructions per segment, compose high-level task plan.

tasks.title: Embodiment-X quality gate
tasks.description: Temporal completeness, spatial coverage, language quality, action label consistency, task plan coherence scoring.
